posts.original:
Nice work by the @Tesla_AI team!

The AI3 computer only has ~15% of the effective memory bandwidth of AI4, so this was a tough challenge.
posts.korean:
@Tesla_AI 팀의 멋진 작업입니다!

AI3 컴퓨터의 유효 메모리 대역폭은 AI4의 15%에 불과하므로 이는 어려운 과제였습니다.

posts.original:
Neuralink is needed to solve the super low & lossy output bandwidth of humans. 

Our input bandwidth, thanks to vision, is many orders of magnitude higher than our output bandwidth, but could also be greatly improved. 

By addressing these bandwidth limitations and greatly
posts.korean:
인간의 초저손실 출력 대역폭을 해결하려면 Neuralink가 필요합니다.

비전 덕분에 우리의 입력 대역폭은 출력 대역폭보다 훨씬 높지만 크게 향상될 수도 있습니다.

이러한 대역폭 제한을 해결함으로써

posts.original: Truly massive gains will come in ~3 months when the entire training and inference stack is written in C/C++ and massively simplified (most software layers will be deleted completely) and we exact-map Grok to work incredibly well on a GB300

posts.korean:

posts.original: The scale of what is to come has no precedent
But for some reason, ID is banned for voting in California, New York and many other states
posts.korean: 그런데 어떤 이유에서인지 캘리포니아, 뉴욕 등 여러 주에서는 투표용 신분증이 금지되어 있습니다.
